description.unified: Deals damage to enemies within range and stuns them for [3 sec->2sec].

Engraves [Mark of Death] on all enemies for 15 sec, dealing M.DMG every 1 sec and reducing M.DEF by [10% (added)]. If recast within 15 sec, the M.DEF reduction increases by [20%->50%] and stacks up to 5 times. The M.DEF reduction increase effect cannot be dispelled.

Deals M.DMG every 1 sec to all enemies for [12 sec->22 sec], and recovers HP equal to [130%->50%] of damage dealt. During the duration, reduces M.DMG taken by [11% (added)] for 4 allies with the lowest M.DEF, and deals additional ATK M.DMG to enemies inflicted with [Mark of Death].

Increases M.DEF of the ally with the lowest M.DEF. When taking fatal damage, enters [Coffin] state for 5 sec, restoring ATK + [6%->10%] Max HP. [Coffin]: Unaffected by ATK Spd changes, becomes immune to all damage, and deals M.DMG equal to 5% of Max HP to nearby enemies every 1 sec.

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [1000->2000], but pulls the target toward you.
All allies additionally take [10% (added)] less Physical DMG.
When the effect triggers, stuns all enemies for [1.2 sec->1 sec].

description.unified: [Funeral Rites] reduces the target's CC Resist by [400->320] and Magic Block chance by {0} for 4 sec.
[Day of Ruin] increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target's M.DEF by 3% for 5 sec each time damage is dealt. This effect can stack up to 10 times.
[Rest in Peace] Sets cooldown to [40 sec->45 sec], and after activation, reduces M.DMG taken by {0}% for 10 sec.

dark.unified: On hit, Attack and Healing increase by 1%. This effect stacks up to [50->35] times.

description.unified: Deals M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK every sec to nearby enemies, reduces their ATK by {1}%, and recovers HP equal to [75%->100%] of damage dealt.
